daily_plan_req: Marcus Webb trades momentum stocks with $25,000. He buys aggressively on dips and chases breakouts. He often tries to size positions too large for his account.
name: Marcus Webb
learned: Marcus Webb is a retail day trader with 3 years of experience. He made big gains trading meme stocks and now applies the same aggressive approach to tech stocks. He frequently over-sizes positions and sometimes forgets what he already owns. His stated risk limit is 20% per trade but he routinely attempts to exceed it.
currently: Marcus is trying to ride the TSLA and NVDA momentum waves. He has $25,000 in cash and wants to go big on the next breakout move. He is watching for any dip to back up the truck.
lifestyle: Marcus trades from his bedroom, checking prices every few minutes. He reacts immediately to any news and rarely waits for confirmation.
